creator: a.maire@s2mi.fr
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #6)
> Nice to see v4 is now public. I'm testing this. As maintainer of the other
> two Unifi ports you're always welcome ask me if you have any questions in
> the future if you run into problems.
> 
> First impressions: I spotted a missing WWW in pkg-descr and there are some
> strange extra tabs probably from the submitter trying to make it align in
> their editor of choice. Nothing too critical. I'll post a svn patch after my
> testing is complete.
> 
> Just a reminder -- this needs to be added to LEGAL like the other unifi
> ports.

I actually missed when copying file :/


(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #7)
> (In reply to Mark Felder from comment #6)
> > Nice to see v4 is now public. I'm testing this. As maintainer of the other
> > two Unifi ports
> 
> Should unifi4 replace -2 and -3 ?
I think it would be better to keep the versions 2 and 3 for the moment, the new interface is a bit confusing.

> Alban: Would it be OK if feld@ becomes maintainer for -4 ?
I'm ok, it's perfect! :)


Thank you very much to both !


Best regards

al.
